xpath.attribute: not (request and request.website and request.website.portal_mode == 'activity' and request.httprequest.path and request.httprequest.path.startswith('/my'))

attribute.name: t-attf-class
attribute.add: #{request and request.website and request.website.portal_mode == 'activity' and request.httprequest.path and request.httprequest.path.startswith('/my') and 'nx-activity-portal-mode' or ''}

t.t-if: request and request.website and request.website.portal_mode == 'activity' and request.httprequest.path and request.httprequest.path.startswith('/my')
request and request.website and request.website.portal_mode == 'activity' and request.httprequest.path and request.httprequest.path.startswith('/my')

div.p: Track confirmed sales orders in one place.
View, download, and pay your customer invoices.
Check approved, pending, and past leave requests.
Review the expense submissions tied to your employee profile.
Jump back into the tasks assigned to you right now.
Follow up on every portal activity still assigned to you.

div.class: wrapper col-12 d-flex flex-wrap justify-content-between align-items-center

button.class: btn py-0 d-flex align-items-center gap-2 d-lg-none ms-auto

a.t-attf-class: nx-portal-sidebar-mini-link #{'is-active' if request and request.httprequest.path == '/my/home' else ''}
a.title: Home

a.t-attf-class: nx-portal-sidebar-mini-link #{'is-active' if request and ('/my/tickets' in request.httprequest.path or '/helpdesk/ticket' in request.httprequest.path) else ''}
a.title: Tickets

a.t-attf-class: nx-portal-sidebar-mini-link #{'is-active' if request and '/my/orders' in request.httprequest.path else ''}
a.title: Orders

a.t-attf-class: nx-portal-sidebar-mini-link #{'is-active' if request and ('/my/elearning' in request.httprequest.path or '/slides' in request.httprequest.path) else ''}
a.title: E-Learning

a.t-attf-class: nx-portal-sidebar-mini-link #{'is-active' if request and ('/my/knowledge' in request.httprequest.path or '/knowledge' in request.httprequest.path) else ''}
a.title: Knowledge

a.t-attf-class: nx-portal-sidebar-mini-link #{'is-active' if request and '/my/warranties' in request.httprequest.path else ''}
a.title: Warranties

a.t-attf-class: nx-portal-sidebar-mini-link #{'is-active' if request and '/contactus' in request.httprequest.path else ''}
a.title: Contact Us

a.t-attf-class: nx-portal-sidebar-mini-link #{'is-active' if request and '/my/account' in request.httprequest.path else ''}
a.title: Edit Profile

div.p: Review every order in the same polished workspace used across the rest of the portal.
Review every order in the same polished workspace used across the rest of the portal.

t.div: There are currently no sales orders for your account.
There are currently no sales orders for your account.

div.p: Track invoice dates, due dates, balances, and payment actions in the same portal style.

t.div: There are currently no invoices and payments for your account.

t.p: There are currently no invoices and payments for your account.

td.t-att-class: 'nx-portal-analytics-date--danger' if invoice.invoice_date_due and invoice.invoice_date_due < datetime.date.today() and invoice.payment_state in ['not_paid', 'partial'] else ''

span.t-elif: invoice.payment_state in ('paid', 'in_payment') and tx_sudo and tx_sudo.state == 'done'
invoice.payment_state in ('not_paid', 'partial') and tx_sudo and tx_sudo.state == 'authorized'
invoice.payment_state in ('not_paid', 'partial') and tx_sudo and tx_sudo.state == 'pending' and tx_sudo.provider_code not in ('none', 'custom')

td.t-att-class: 'text-danger' if invoice.invoice_date_due and invoice.invoice_date_due < datetime.date.today() and invoice.payment_state in ['not_paid', 'partial'] else ''
